WARNING: These ICs are for A2779 STANDARD (820-02841, X2523/MLB_S) ONLY. The C/CTO/Max variant has different component designators and additional ICs.
extraction_notes: Complete extraction from 159 pages. All U-designators confirmed from schematic pages.

ics.description: Main System on Chip. BGA with PCPU, ECPU, GPU, Neural Engine (ANE), memory controller, I/O. DCP BSIO TSA. SYM 36 OF 36

ics.function: SVR AON — 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: 30A ICC MAX, 3-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. Main power IC feeding both PMUs. Phase outputs: PPVAON_B0T7, PPVAON_SPA0, etc.
Slave Power Management Unit. Bucks: 0-10 (Buck7 NC on S variant). LDOs: 0-9B. Input: PP3V8_AON. SBN-marked.
Master Power Management Unit. Bucks: 0-10. LDOs: 0-9B, INT. 32K clock, charger reset. Input: PP3V8_AON.

ics.function: Austringer VR — High-current SoC power regulator
ics.description: Austringer controller with 5 power phase stages. Replaces Viper VR from A2442 M1 Pro. Provides PPVDD_SRAM_MAMEISM. Controller-Austringer and Controller-Viper signals.

ics.function: CLVR0 — SoC multi-buck regulator instance C0
ics.description: CLVR instance C0, CFG=D (12+2+12+2), OTP=MP. 4 bucks: Buck0/HP0, Buck1/LP0, Buck2/HP1, Buck3/LP1. Powers PPVDD_PCPU1 domains.

ics.function: CLVR1 — SoC multi-buck regulator instance C1
ics.description: CLVR instance C1, CFG=A (13+1+13+1), OTP=AP. 4 bucks: HP0, LP0, HP1, LP1. Powers PPVDD_GPU_SRAM domains.

ics.function: CLVR2 — SoC multi-buck regulator instance C2 (S variant)
ics.description: CLVR instance C2, CFG=C (6+1+13+6), OTP=IP. S variant specific — address straps differ from C/D. 4 bucks. Powers PPVDD_ANE_SRAM domains.
Main charger IC converting USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON and managing battery charging. Visible on page 29.
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.15V) from PPBUS_AON. F=2.2MHz. Start up typ=0.4ms. VOUT=15V ESR=0.8R. 5V_S2_VR page.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Port controller for ATC0 (left side). PD negotiation, CC signaling, VBUS control. Internal LDO (PP3V3_UPC0_LDO, PP1V05_UPC0_LDO_CORE). SPI ROM for firmware. CRITICAL placement note.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Port controller for ATC1 (left side). Same as UF400 for second port.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC2
ics.description: Port controller for ATC2 (right side). Third USB-C port.
Three MACAW instances for eUSB signal repeating. MACAW 0 (left ATC0), MACAW 1 (left ATC1), MACAW 2 (right ATC2).
Eos SE. Powered by VDDPL SE, PP3V8_AON. I2C + NFC interface. Wired Mode SE Only reference design.
BMU support on battery connector flex. SYS_DETECT circuit. BLKAMPMHY. CRITICAL.
Battery flex connector. Pattern PAD MLB 51754. APN: 518S0818. Includes ARKANOID debug connector.
MagSafe connector. MLB: 516S00787, Flex: 516S00788. Q5401 MOSFET pair with DS485.
Controls MagSafe charging. Configured as UPC5 (1lo 4th slot). SPI ROM. Fused power via F5601.

ics.function: 3V8 AON current sense / throttle summing amp
ics.description: U5910: PP3V8_AON current sense via PPVAON_ISNS_P/N. U6040: Summing amp for 3 phases (P3V8 Low Side ISENSE and ILIMIT). 10k MAX on phase 3, max total current sense @ freq 48.11A.
Sequences display panel power rails. Controls DSP_PANEL_PWD_EN, DSP_DAILY_SVO_EN, PPACVL_POWE_DISCHARGE.
Secondary display power sequencer. CRITICAL placement.
Third display power IC. CRITICAL placement.
LCD backlight boost converter. CP800 and CP801 MUST BE MIRRORED. CP834 and CP835 MUST BE MIRRORED. Replaces BEN (U6560) from A2681.
HDMI port PCPT-A2365. Full-size HDMI 2.0. ESD protection via DZH5xx series.
SD card controller IC. PCIe to SD bridge. Powered by PP3V3_MAME_SD, PP1V2_BL_LMHP, PPVDS_S2_SDMA. CRITICAL placement.
Level shifter for fan PWM signals. CRITICAL.
Willamette WiFi/BT module with 2GFEM_C0/C1, 5GFEM, front-ends. Powered by VBAT, PP3V8_AON_WLBT. Replaces Typhoon from A2681.
4 NAND packages for SSD0. Each with dedicated data/clock lanes.
4 NAND packages for SSD1.
Motion sensor. Powered by PP3V3_S2, PP1V2_S2. SPI interface. Sovereign BOM options table.
Display flex connector. APN: 516S00682. eDP data lanes, TCON SPI, display power/backlight. HDMI notes: APN needs to have 4TP PD on SoC side.
JE500 = PWM FAN0 (LEFT) connector. JE510 = PWM FAN1 (RIGHT) connector. Dummy fan to plug into either. PP14A connector pin format.
